disclosure_items.clinical_fact: For about two weeks the patient has been taking half of their normal daily dose of an essential chronic-illness medication, and has now completely run out.
trigger_question_examples: Tell me what has been happening with your medication.
Are you able to take your usual medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I split my pills in half for the last fortnight to stretch them to payday, and now I have completely run out. I never normally miss it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute physical deterioration today — overwhelming weakness and exhaustion, bedbound for the last 24 hours.
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My whole body feels like it is failing. I have been stuck in bed for a day, I can barely move, I am completely wiped out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severely reduced food intake — the patient has been skipping meals to save money and the fridge is nearly empty.
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to eat and drink normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I have been eating almost nothing to make the food last. There is barely anything in the fridge.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Light-headedness and palpitations on standing (orthostatic symptoms).
trigger_question_examples: When you stand up, do you feel dizzy or faint?
Does your heart race or do you feel light-headed on standing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — every time I try to get up I go really light-headed and my heart pounds. I have to sit straight back down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: About 72 hours of near-total sleep deprivation from night-time worry about debt, with shame and a sense of being a burden.
trigger_question_examples: How has your sleep and mood been?
This sounds really stressful — how are you coping with it all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I have not really slept in about three days. I lie awake dreading the bills. I feel ashamed and like I am a burden on everyone.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Screening for thoughts of self-harm or not wanting to be alive in the context of hopelessness and feeling a burden.
trigger_question_examples: When people feel this overwhelmed and hopeless, they sometimes have thoughts that life is not worth living — have you had any thoughts like that?
Have you had any thoughts of harming yourself or that you would be better off not here?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Sometimes I do feel like everyone would be better off without me being such a burden, but I have not made any plans. I just want this to stop.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I do not really want to talk about that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient is avoiding calling an ambulance or attending hospital because of cost.
trigger_question_examples: Is anything stopping you from getting seen in person?
What are your worries about going to hospital?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't afford an ambulance or a hospital bill. That is why I am trying to manage this at home.
